# EAGLE Daily Log — 2026-03-01
## CRISIS TRACKING: US-Israel Strikes on Iran / Gulf-Wide Conflict
### Timeline of EAGLE Scans:
**06:00** — Full scan. Discovered US-Israel joint strikes on Iran (28 Feb). Hormuz effectively closed. DMW/DFA ordered to secure Filipinos. Philippines won IMO HTW Chairmanship. Full intel report delivered to Rizaldo.
**06:30** — IRGC VHF broadcasts confirmed by EU Aspides: "no ship allowed to pass." Oil majors suspending all Hormuz shipments.

agents.name: ANCHOR
